systemLanguagePrompt.title: Usar o idioma do seu sistema?
systemLanguagePrompt.description: Detectamos {{language}} como o idioma do seu sistema. Deseja mudar o OpenScreen para {{language}}?

recordingSettings.title: Settings

trayLayout.label: Vertical tray
trayLayout.description: Stack HUD controls vertically instead of horizontally.

excludeTaskbar.label: Exclude taskbar
excludeTaskbar.description: When recording a display, capture only the work area without the taskbar.

windowPadding.label: Window capture padding
windowPadding.description: Extra pixels to include around a selected window on all four sides.

recordingSettings.nativeOnlyHint: These options apply to native Windows capture.
